case_title: LO, FONG VS GOMES, JACKSON B. et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO CAIRO MACHADO RETURNED NOT AT THIS ADDRESS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $717.04 FILED BY LO, FONG AS TO DEFENDANT GOMES, JACKSON B. MACHADO, CAIRO B FARIS, JORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LO, FONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMES, JACKSON B. MACHADO, CAIRO B FARIS, JORGE $717.04 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $732.04 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
